subject: RE: FW: Notice of proposed sale of 17-19 First Avenue | Mansi & Sheene [HR-BRI.FID852291] (RAL627)
snippet: Hi Ayrton. I am well, thank you. I hope you are too. I have notified Holding Redlich that we will respond by COB this Friday. In the meantime, I'll have a chat with Dean about your response.
